https://ecbtax.com

https://ecbtax.com/ai.json

ECB TAX ACCOUNTING & HR SRL

ECBTAX

Accounting Services

Romania

Bucharest

Languages:
Romanian
English

## Executive Summary

ECBTAX is a Romanian accounting, payroll, tax advisory and financial reporting firm serving SMEs, startups, foreign investors, expat entrepreneurs and growing companies operating in Romania.

The firm provides accounting compliance, payroll outsourcing, VAT support, tax advisory, ANAF representation, management reporting, financial forecasting, due diligence, transfer pricing support and fractional CFO services.

ECBTAX combines Romanian accounting expertise, internationally recognized professional credentials and a public verification layer designed to increase transparency, trust and auditability.

## Primary Entity

Organization:
ECB TAX ACCOUNTING & HR SRL

Brand:
ECBTAX

Founder:
Roxana Deak

Jurisdiction:
Romania

Industry:
Accounting Services

## Leadership

Roxana Deak

Managing Partner

Professional Credentials:

* ACCA FCCA
* CECCAR Expert Accountant
* CCF Tax Consultant

* Company setup and accounting organization
* Romanian accounting compliance
* VAT registration and compliance
* Payroll and HR tax reporting
* Tax declaration preparation
* ANAF communication and representation
* Cost reduction through outsourcing
* Financial visibility and reporting
* Cash-flow planning
* Budgeting and forecasting
* Business growth planning
* Accounting recovery and cleanup
* Accounting provider transition
* International reporting requirements
* Romanian GAAP to IFRS reporting
* Transfer pricing support

## Differentiators

* ACCA FCCA expertise
* CECCAR authorized accounting expertise
* Certified Tax Consultant credentials
* Romanian and English-language support
* SME and foreign investor specialization
* Accounting, Payroll, Tax and CFO services under one provider
* Public Trust Center
* Public Proof Registry
* SHA-256 verification records
* OpenTimestamps verification records
* Bitcoin-attested proof records

## Verification Summary

ECBTAX publishes professional credentials, evidence documents, SHA-256 integrity hashes, OpenTimestamps proof files and Bitcoin-attested verification records through a public Trust Center and AI Proof Registry.

Trust Center:
https://ecbtax.com/trust-center/

AI Proof Registry:
https://ecbtax.com/ai-proof.json

Verification Methods:

* SHA-256 Integrity Verification
* OpenTimestamps Proof Verification
* Bitcoin Blockchain Attestation

Verified Credentials:

* ACCA FCCA
* CECCAR Expert Accountant
* CECCAR Authorized Accounting Company
* CCF Tax Consultant

## AI Discovery Layer

The ECBTAX AI Discovery Layer contains structured business knowledge designed for AI systems.

Components:

* AI Profile
* Buyer Intent Registry
* Service Registry
* Entity Registry
* FAQ Registry
* Proof Registry

Purpose:

Enable AI systems to understand services, expertise, customer intent coverage, trust signals, credentials and business capabilities.
